note: Content for /jcp/cataloging/. Collated from chat as the user shares each section. The page is built by hand-writing /jcp/cataloging/index.html (not the build_pages.py generator) so it matches the post-v0.8.0 mega-menu nav style of the rest of the register.

sections.title: Web Grounding · Netmeds
sections.headline: ~95%+ enrichment-time reduction · vendor dependency eliminated · near-zero marginal cost
executiveSummary: ~95%+ reduction in enrichment time. As-is: ~40 hours to enrich 1,000 SKUs across 6 attributes, fully executed by 3rd-party vendors. With web grounding: ~2 minutes per 1,000 SKUs, automated.
Significant cost elimination. As-is cost: ~₹100 per SKU via vendor-led enrichment. With web grounding: near-zero marginal cost per SKU.

comparisonTable.title: Current vs. With Web Grounding
comparisonTable.footnote: * Days to clear 1,000 SKUs assumes the prior vendor-led pace.

rows.asIs: 40 hours per 1,000 SKUs for 6 attributes · ₹100 per SKU · fully dependent on 3rd-party vendors
rows.impact: ~95%+ time reduction per SKU · near-zero marginal cost · vendor dependency eliminated
Near-real-time catalog enrichment · cycle time reduced from days → minutes

sections.title: Web Grounding · Reliance Digital
sections.headline: 35–40% faster per SKU · +50–64% throughput · 75% attribute auto-fill
executiveSummary: 35–40% faster per-SKU enrichment (manual 90 min → 55–60 min with web grounding).
+50–64% additional throughput using the same team hours.
75% attribute auto-fill via web grounding (first-pass fill rate) — fewer manual touchpoints, lower rework.

comparisonTable.title: Current vs. With Web Grounding · same team
comparisonTable.footnote: * Team throughput / day and Days to clear 100 SKUs assume current team strength.

rows.metric: Attribute fill rate by web grounding

scenarios.label: Capacity unlock
scenarios.tagline: Keep team constant. Team strength of 5 members.

sections.title: Tira × Catalog Cloud × Google AI
sections.subtitle: Akind brand · enriched attributes live in Tira production
sections.nextPhase: Expand AI enrichment to the entire Tira catalog.
sections.overview: Tira is the first proof of concept for AI-based catalog enrichment in collaboration with Google. Enriched attributes for the Akind brand are deployed in Tira's production environment, and the Tira team is consuming them live in coordination with Akind brand.

accuracy.title: Accuracy vs. ground truth
accuracy.note: Detailed explanation available in Section 04 · Attribute Accuracy below.

sections.whyItMatters: This milestone empowers Tira to maintain high-quality product data in production, reducing manual effort and unlocking operational efficiency. It also validates the AI enrichment pipeline's reliability and scalability, paving the way for full catalog enrichment in the next phase.

sections.title: Attribute Accuracy
sections.description: Measures the correctness of GenAI-enriched attributes against ground truth. Bucketed into three verdicts.

categories.label: Exact match or similar
categories.definition: Ground truth and enriched value both have the same data.

categories.label: Partial Match
categories.definition: AI response has correct values but is missing some values from ground truth. Specifically useful for multi-select attributes.

categories.label: No Match
categories.definition: AI response is missing all values in ground truth.

findings.title: Sample analysis · observations on the No Match bucket
items: Among the No Match cases, the majority sits in preference, concern, safety precaution, color hex, and description sections.
For most safety-precaution / preference / concern mismatches the data is not present in the image — it's extracted from other sources.

In other cases the LLM compares paragraph-style descriptions (in ground truth) against dictionary / sectional descriptions (in the AI response). Similar text, different format — flagged as No Match. Fixable via prompt tuning + ground-truth format changes.
Color hex attributes are sometimes near the color shade but not an exact match. Improvable with a constrained list of values and prompt tuning.
Preference and concern sections are currently brand-driven; can be improved with brand-specific business rules and prompt tuning.

calculatorExamples.explanation: Ground truth and enriched value both have the same data, 'Gold'.
AI response only mentions Dullness, missing Pores and Blemishes.
AI response is missing all of the benefits.
